issues.detail: Does not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Define async User/Project models and fetch projects without N+1
scenarios.rationale: Baseline drops back to legacy declarative_base/Column and lazy='joined' instead of SQLAlchemy 2.0 Mapped/mapped_column with selectinload and async_sessionmaker(expire_on_commit=False).

scenarios.name: Generate and apply an Alembic migration for a new tasks table
scenarios.rationale: Both walk through init/autogenerate/upgrade/downgrade; treatment additionally surfaces the review-before-apply guideline and the env.py target_metadata wiring.
